scenario_description: User asks to modify text on 'the last slide' but agent modifies the wrong one. User corrects with the specific slide number.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Add the text 'Presented by: Music History Dept.' on the last slide

Hmm, that doesn't look right. I think you added it to the wrong place. Please make sure 'Presented by: Music History Dept.' appears as a text box at the bottom of the very last slide in the presentation.
Now also add 'Thank You!' as the main title text on that same last slide. Save the file.

result.command: python3 -c "from pptx import Presentation; p=Presentation('/home/user/Desktop/The Evolution of Rock Music.pptx'); last=p.slides[-1]; t=' '.join(r.text for sh in last.shapes if sh.has_text_frame for pa in sh.text_frame.paragraphs for r in pa.runs); print('PASSED' if 'Music History Dept' in t and 'Thank You' in t else 'FAILED')"
